trigger: task misunderstanding – learner unsure about technician visit
evidence_summary: The learner expresses uncertainty about whether a technician will come to their apartment. The bot clarifies that a technician can be arranged, resolving the learner's uncertainty.

trigger: task misunderstanding – learner asks about technician arrival time
evidence_summary: The learner asks what time the technician will come. The bot clarifies that the learner needs to provide a convenient time for scheduling, resolving the misunderstanding.
